M. Boushra et al.
Journal of Drug Delivery Science and Technology 49 (2019) 632–641
Fig. 3. Evaluation of chemical stability and biological activity of entrapped insulin of BLN: (A) Fresh insulin sample. Insulin peaks at retention time (RT) at

8.3 min; (B) Insulin and its main degradation product A21-desamido insulin. RT of
insulin and degradant at 8.3 and 10.3 min, respectively; (C) Insulin entrapped
within BLN showing only one peak with RT at 8.3 min as authentic insulin with absence of degradation peak indicating its stability and integrity. (D) Comparison of

the luminescence activities of
insulin reporter cells treated with fresh insulin or insulin released from BLN. Results represent mean + SD (n = 3).
